changes.description: Added per-unit conversion (Sbase=100 MVA) for DC power flow to fix bus angle magnitudes. Added explicit verification checklist. Restructured economic dispatch with float() conversion and re-clamping after rounding.
changes.impact: power-flow: 85→100 (fixed angles-reasonable criterion). economic-dispatch: unchanged at 80.

changes.description: Made economic dispatch algorithm more prescriptive with complete copy-pastable code, 500 iterations, tighter convergence (1e-8), explicit float() on all JSON values, and post-rounding re-clamping.
changes.impact: No score change. Confirmed economic-dispatch ceiling at 80.

notes: economic-dispatch is capped at 80/100 due to a task definition bug: the criterion 'within-limits' uses testPattern 'within limits' which does not match the actual test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (regex /within limits/i fails because 'min/max ' appears between 'within' and 'limits'). The within-limits criterion (weight=0.2) always scores 0 regardless of model output correctness. The model consistently produces correct output that passes all tests when run manually.
